source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In an aluminum (Al) bar of square cross section, a square hole is drilled and is filled with iron (Fe) as shown in the figure. The electrical resistivities of Al and Fe are $2.7 \times 10^{-8}$ $\Omega$ m and $1.0 \times 10^{-7}$ $\Omega$ m, respectively. The electrical resistance between the two faces P and Q of the composite bar is
<image_1>

the geometry of the composite bar and faces P, Q is not fully specified in text alone

the task is not direct lookup; it requires extracting structural information from the figure and performing calculation
choice_count=4 suggests a computable quantitative result

multiple-choice options are provided, enabling outcome checking
